text: Object Oriented Programming (OOP) Dr. Abdurrahman A. Nasr Al-Azhar University
Lecture 2 JDK and Data types

Java Development Kit (JDK) • java: Serves as a Java interpreter used to run Java applications by reading and interpreting bytecode files • javac: Serves as a Java compiler used to translate Java source code files. • javadoc: Creates HTML documentation for Java source code files • javap: Serves as a Java disassemble used to convert bytecode files into a Java program description • jdb: Serves as a Java debugger used to find errors in Java programs • jar: Serves as archive used to package related class libraries into a single executable JAR file.

Java Tokens: Identifiers Symbolic name that refers to name of variables, methods, classes, packages, interfaces Consist of alphabets, numbers, underscore(_), and the dollar sign $ Can’t start with number Case sensitive, so move and Move are 2 different identifiers Camel case

Increment and Decrement

=

Unary operators. There are two kinds, prefix and postfix. In prefix method, the value of the operand is incremented or decremented before assigning the postfix method the value of the operand is incremented or decremented after assigning it to a variable.

WHILE

When executing, if the boolean_expression result is true then the actions inside the loop will be executed. This will

DO-WHILE

The Boolean expression appears at the end of the loop, so the statements in the loop execute once before the Boolean do, and the statements in the loop execute again. This process repeats until the Boolean expression is false.

Return-type: value data type returned after method exec

Parameter-list: declares the data variables that are passed to

and used by the method
